title: tamia pallens
intro: Tamia pallens, also known as the pale tamianthus or white tamianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the cypress family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tamia pallens include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Tamia pallens can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
